title: phyllanthus womersleyi
intro: Phyllanthus womersleyi, a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, is native to Australia and is commonly known as the Woolly Phyllanthus. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus womersleyi include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine in small quantities.
